name: glucose_mgmt
description: a diabetes glucose-management world: blood glucose responds to dose, meals, exercise; actions dose_insulin, eat, exercise

card.description: a diabetes glucose-management world: blood glucose responds to dose, meals, exercise; actions dose_insulin, eat, exercise

rules: Each step advances 30 minutes of simulated time.
'eat' adds its 'carbs' param (default 45.0 g) to carbs-on-board (cob).
Each step half of carbs-on-board digests, raising glucose by 3 mg/dL per gram digested.
Each step 30% of insulin-on-board absorbs, lowering glucose by 40 mg/dL per unit absorbed.
'exercise' burns 30 mg/dL per unit of intensity (default 1.0) and boosts insulin sensitivity by 50% per unit of intensity for that step.
Endogenous liver output drifts glucose 10% of the way back to a 100 mg/dL baseline each step.
Glucose is clamped to [20, 600] mg/dL; status is hypoglycemia (<70), in_range (70-180), or hyperglycemia (>180).

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name", "wait")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    # --- actions deposit into the on-board compartments -------------------
    if name == "dose_insulin":
        s["iob"] = s.get("iob", 0.0) + float(params.get("units", 1.0))
    elif name == "eat":
        s["cob"] = s.get("cob", 0.0) + float(params.get("carbs", 45.0))

    # --- model constants (per 30-min step) --------------------------------
    CARB_ABSORB = 0.5      # fraction of carbs-on-board digested per step
    INSULIN_ABSORB = 0.3   # fraction of insulin-on-board absorbed per step
    CARB_GAIN = 3.0        # mg/dL glucose rise per gram of carb digested
    ISF = 40.0             # mg/dL glucose drop per unit of insulin absorbed
    BASELINE = 100.0       # basal set-point the liver drifts toward
    DRIFT = 0.1            # endogenous pull toward baseline per step

    glucose = float(s.get("glucose", 120.0))
    cob = float(s.get("cob", 0.0))
    iob = float(s.get("iob", 0.0))

    carbs_digested = cob * CARB_ABSORB
    insulin_absorbed = iob * INSULIN_ABSORB

    # carbs raise glucose
    glucose += CARB_GAIN * carbs_digested

    # exercise: direct glucose uptake plus heightened insulin sensitivity
    sensitivity = ISF
    if name == "exercise":
        intensity = float(params.get("intensity", 1.0))
        sensitivity *= (1.0 + 0.5 * intensity)
        glucose -= 30.0 * intensity

    # insulin lowers glucose
    glucose -= sensitivity * insulin_absorbed

    # liver/basal homeostasis pulls toward baseline
    glucose += DRIFT * (BASELINE - glucose)

    # decay the on-board compartments by what was used this step
    cob = max(0.0, cob - carbs_digested)
    iob = max(0.0, iob - insulin_absorbed)

    # clamp to a physiological range
    glucose = max(20.0, min(600.0, glucose))

    if glucose < 70.0:
        status = "hypoglycemia"
    elif glucose > 180.0:
        status = "hyperglycemia"
    else:
        status = "in_range"

    s["glucose"] = round(glucose, 2)
    s["cob"] = round(cob, 4)
    s["iob"] = round(iob, 4)
    s["status"] = status
    s["minutes"] = int(s.get("minutes", 0)) + 30
    return s

emit.report: t={minutes}min: blood glucose {glucose} mg/dL ({status}); insulin-on-board {iob} U, carbs-on-board {cob} g.
